name: Signal
description: Dark, motion-driven, product-builder template. Hero leads with positioning + anchor stat + named employers. Skills render inline as evidence tags under each project, not as a logo grid. Testimonials surface as pull-quotes between case studies.
audience: Design engineers, senior engineers, product-leaning IC contributors
inspiration: brittanychiang.com, jimraptis.com, polgubau.com, keita yamada (p5aholic.me), cole emeruche
